title: An integrated complex designed to operate year-round
subtitle: The centre is structured around complementary assets that generate activity, demand and visibility across the entire project.
paragraph1: Each part is designed to work independently, while reinforcing the others through shared traffic, events and services.
paragraph2: This is the foundation for a scalable operation with multiple income lines and controlled execution.

items.title: Motor Circuit
items.text: Infrastructure for training, competitions and private track experiences.

items.title: High Performance
items.text: Facilities for athlete preparation, recovery and specialised programs.

items.title: Events & Hospitality
items.text: Brand activations, corporate events and premium guest experiences.

items.title: Technology Platform
items.text: Digital layer to connect users, operations and investment transparency.
